mapper.select: SELECT a.id, a.item_id as itemId, a.comment_id as commentId, a.uploader_id as uploaderId, a.file_name as fileName, a.file_size as fileSize, a.mime_type as mimeType, a.storage_url as storageUrl, CAST(a.created_at AS TIMESTAMP) as createdAt, u.full_name as uploaderName FROM attachments a JOIN users u ON a.uploader_id = u.id WHERE a.item_id = CAST(#{itemId} AS UUID) ORDER BY a.created_at DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT uuid_generate_v4()
INSERT INTO attachments ( id, item_id, comment_id, uploader_id, file_name, file_size, mime_type, storage_url, created_at ) VALUES ( CAST(#{id} AS UUID), CAST(#{itemId} AS UUID)NULL, CAST(#{commentId} AS UUID)NULL, CAST(#{uploaderId} AS UUID), #{fileName}, #{fileSize}, #{mimeType}, #{storageUrl}, NOW() )
